text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a stroll through town on my day off when I spot Satono
Diamond. She looks somewhat troubled.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! You came at just the right time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Would you like to go to an amusement park?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow! It's so busy when you haven't booked the whole place out!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, thanks for coming on such short notice. I had a VIP pass set to
expire today, so it would've gone to waste. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita had something urgent come up, so I was thinking I'd have to
come alone!
choice_data_list: You were really looking forward to this, huh?
You were really looking forward to this, huh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I could hardly sleep a wink last night, and—Oh! Look, it's
Horsegirl-kun! We have to get a photo!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hurry, hurry! Come join the picture! Okay, say "cheese!"

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Next, let's... oh, over there! That line's so long! Come on, let's go join
it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'm always being let in right away, so I want to try savoring the
anticipation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend an hour or so chatting in line. When our turn finally comes,
we enter the attraction.

text_block_list.name: Zombie
text_block_list.text: Groooaaar!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hyaah!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ehehehe! What a fright! This is so fun! ♪ Where did it even come
from?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that a hidden door? That's it! I bet the zombie was waiting
behind there. Let's go see!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This haunted house is so cutting-edge! I have to get a look behind
the scenes!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hnnng! That was so fun! Every attraction was a blast!
choice_data_list: We must've covered the entire park!
We must've covered the entire park!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we're not done yet! Next up is the park's game plaza! Come on,
let's go!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They have a number of claw machines here from my family's
conglomerate.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, look! That one has the park's merchandise! They're all so cute!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Still, given their position, we should wait until they reset them. Let's
warm up on the other machines first!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, claw machines are my specialty! I've been playing them since I
was little!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I often accompanied my parents when they made visits to our affiliate
game company.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The claw machines were a fun way of passing the time while I waited
for them to finish work.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, more like I tagged along because I wanted to play on the
machines! Hehe! ♪
choice_data_list: Then let's see what you can do!
Then let's see what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, just sit back and watch! ♪ I'll win you whatever you want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In no time at all, Satono Diamond wins me a whole armful of prizes!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ♪ See? Told you it was my specialty! And I'm just getting
started!
choice_data_list: W-wait, let me put these away first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pack the prizes into a large shopping bag, but with so many, we'll
probably have to carry some home in our arms...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I might've gone a little overboard. Shall we call a taxi later to
take us back?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I didn't mean to get so carried away again... Ah...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Come to think of it, this happened with the Floral Makeover Project
too. Trainer is always going along with what I want.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Is this what my upperclassman at the meeting meant? Am I taking
advantage of Trainer's kindness?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um, don't worry about getting those home—I'll manage somehow!
I do have Umamusume strength, after all.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's nothing. I'm sorry for getting carried away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's smiling, she looks bothered by something. Maybe
brightening up the mood would help her open up.
choice_data_list: I think I'll give these claw machines a shot.
I think I'll give these claw machines a shot.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes! Do your best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'll aim for... the prize she called cute earlier!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's the park's merch...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow! You got it! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...!
Wow, are you sure?!
choice_data_list: Fair's fair, since you got me so many.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But I only did that because I wanted to...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I know! I'll get the same one so that we're match—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: U-um... never mind!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll take good care of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's smile looks a little unsure. I've seen many new sides
to her today, but I'm not sure what to make of this one.
